ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – April 30
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a friendly reminder that the semester project is due on April 30 at 5:00 PM. Please submit your final report via the LMS by the deadline.

If you need any assistance or have questions, feel free to reach out.

Thanks,
Professor Smith

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – FedEx Delivery Fee Overdue
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a missed delivery for your shipment #123456. A fee of $150.00 is pending and must be paid within 48 hours to avoid cancellation of your package.

Please confirm payment by visiting <URL> and following the instructions. Failure to comply may result in additional charges or shipment denial.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
